notes.pixel_check: Cross-mode CAPTURE CONSISTENCY (Feature Protocol step 9): task 083 changes settle TIMING + adds a text .cast; it does NOT change how frames render, so the meaningful pixel gate is actual-vs-actual — a frame captured after a --stable-frames / --hold-ms settle is pixel-identical (0 diff) to the SAME live content under the old quiet/hold path. Both PNGs freshly generated this audit; not a committed-baseline compare, so no golden PNG / DootSabha baseline approval is required.
notes.repaint_pair: repaint-stableframes-120x40-actual.png (--stable-frames 5) vs repaint-holdms-120x40-actual.png (--hold-ms 400ms) on the identical repainter -> pixel-repaint-crossmode.json (0 changed px).
notes.static_pair: static-quiet-120x40-actual.png (default quiet, old path) vs static-holdms-120x40-actual.png (--hold-ms, new path) on the static frame -> pixel-static-crossmode.json (0 changed px).
notes.cast: run.cast is the asciinema v2 validity artifact (header {version:2,width:80,height:24}; events all valid [t,"o"|"r",data] with non-decreasing t; resize step yields "r" 100x30; lands outside the golden dir).
